channel.title: Blogs on nipanko
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on nipanko

item.title: Lexical
item.description: Rough Idea TILL ICG (Intermediate Code Generator) -> everything is front end and rest is backend

item.title: C++
item.description: Linux distribution mainly consists of the following components Boot Loader Init System Display Renderer Display Manager Display Environments Package Managers All Linux Distros differ based on these 3 components

item.title: Symbol Tables
item.description: 123456789 from manimlib import *class SquareToCircle(Scene): def construct(self): circle = Circle() circle.set_fill(BLUE, opacity=0.5) circle.set_stroke(BLUE_E, width=4) self.
